tasks: Check Shining Light Dolls free monthly printables
Place seasonal books on hold at the library
Review family events (anniversaries, birthdays, name days)
Schedule date nights (at least one this month)
Fertilize Siberian Elm (once in the winter)
CEUs: sign up for AudiogyOnline if odd year — complete 10 CEU hours Jan–Jun
garden: Plan garden layout for the year

February.marian_antiphon: Alma Redemptoris Mater until Feb 2 (Candlemas), then Ave Regina Caelorum
February.liturgical_notes: Candlemas Feb 2 — antiphon changes day after
tasks: Order King Cake for Mardi Gras from Paul's Bakery (order two if guests)

March.marian_antiphon: Ave Regina Caelorum until Easter, then Regina Caeli from Easter through Pentecost
March.liturgical_notes: Easter this month some years — antiphon changes on Easter day
tasks: Prune China Rose (1/3 of its length)
Clean out the fridge with bleach
garden: Prune China Rose (remove 1/3 of its length)

April.marian_antiphon: Ave Regina Caelorum until Easter, then Regina Caeli through Pentecost
April.von_trapp: Easter Vigil to the Saturday after Pentecost
April.liturgical_notes: Easter this month most years — antiphon changes on Easter day
tasks: Go through winter/summer clothes for boys — check fit and plan purchasing

May.marian_antiphon: Regina Caeli through Pentecost, then Salve Regina from Pentecost until Advent
May.liturgical_notes: Pentecost this month some years — antiphon changes
tasks: Direct sow creeping thyme outdoors when temps in 60s or above
garden: Direct sow creeping thyme (blue, red) outdoors when temps are in 60s+

June.marian_antiphon: Regina Caeli through Pentecost, then Salve Regina from Pentecost until Advent
tasks: Submit end of year homeschool paperwork
HVAC: close basement vents, open upstairs vents (hot weather)

July.marian_antiphon: Salve Regina from Pentecost until Advent begins
tasks: Homeschooling prep (arrange piano lessons, declutter tower, prep scheduling sheets)
CEUs: sign up for AudiogyOnline if odd year — complete 10 CEU hours Jul–Dec
Christmas shopping: start picking up things for boys to stay in budget

August.marian_antiphon: Salve Regina from Pentecost until Advent begins
tasks: Homeschooling: proof of academic progress due on the 1st

September.marian_antiphon: Salve Regina from Pentecost until Advent begins
tasks: Start saving romaine cuttings for garden
Braehead Farm passes start over — check new passes
garden: Start saving romaine cuttings for garden

October.marian_antiphon: Salve Regina from Pentecost until Advent begins
tasks: Take out Halloween books and DVDs

November.marian_antiphon: Salve Regina until Advent, then Alma Redemptoris Mater from Advent through Feb 2
November.liturgical_notes: Advent begins this month — antiphon changes at Advent
tasks: Go through winter clothes for boys — check fit and plan purchasing
Service summer tools (lawnmower, pruning shears, hand tools)
Clean and put away summer toys
Pressure wash deck furniture and cushions
HVAC: open basement vents, close third floor vents (cold weather)
garden: Service summer tools (lawnmower, pruning shears, hand tools)
Clean and put away summer toys
Pressure wash deck furniture and cushions

tasks: Winter Encampment prep: extra towels, washcloths, chapstick, lotion, toiletry bag, warm outer clothing (hat, heavy coat, double gloves, heated vest?)
HVAC: open basement vents, close third floor vents (cold weather)
Put summer/outdoor toys out of the weather
garden: Put summer/outdoor toys out of the weather

penance_time_chores: Clean under the oven, fridge, air fryer
litany_to_begin_again: That I may begin immediately,
That I may never fail to begin again,
That I may begin even without devotion,
That I may begin each day,
That I may begin every day,
That I may begin every hour of the day,
That I may say with boldness, "Now I begin,"
That I may begin humbly and with full confidence,
That I may begin with holy tenacity,
That I may begin with faith,
That I may begin with gentleness,
That I may begin with peace,
That I may decide always to begin,
That I may begin again, firmly convinced that God forgives me,
That I may rise immediately and begin again,
That I may always, and in every moment, begin again,
That I may begin again to trust,
That I may begin again to hope,
That I may begin again to love,
Venerable Bruno, pray for me. Amen.
